new-website-2026.title: The Digital Tap is Open!
new-website-2026.summary: After a lot of brewing—both in the kettle and behind the keyboard—I’m thrilled to officially welcome you to my new homebrew site. For a long time, my recipes and tasting notes were scattered across sticky notes and notebooks, but I finally decided it was time to build a "digital taproom" to share the journey with fellow fermentation enthusiasts.
new-website-2026.content:
After a lot of brewing—both in the kettle and behind the keyboard—I’m thrilled to officially welcome you to my new homebrew site. For a long time, my recipes and tasting notes were scattered across sticky notes and notebooks, but I finally decided it was time to build a "digital taproom" to share the journey with fellow fermentation enthusiasts.

This isn't a commercial site—you won’t find any "Add to Cart" buttons here—just a passion project dedicated to the art of small-batch brewing. My heart lies in the traditional styles, though I’m always looking for a bit of flair. Whether it’s perfecting a classic pilsner or pushing the boundaries of Belgian yeasts with experimental fruit and spice additions, I’ll be documenting the processes, equipment tweaks, and all the lessons learned along the way. Thanks for dropping by, and I hope you find something here that inspires your next brew day!
